title: olearia alpicola
intro: Olearia alpicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Alpine Tree Daisy. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia alpicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Olearia alpicola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional remedies to support overall well-being.
